prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic editorial fashion image of a stylish young woman walking alone down the center of an empty elevated Tokyo expressway, as if the entire Shuto Expressway has been closed for a private shoot. She wears a crisp all-white tailored pantsuit with a white top and white shoes, hands in trouser pockets, confident relaxed posture, full-body centered composition, long dark wavy hair, face softly anonymized or blurred. The road surface is dark wet-looking asphalt with strong perspective lines, white lane markings, concrete guardrails on both sides, no cars and no pedestrians. In the background, show dense modern Tokyo high-rise buildings and Tokyo Tower on the right side under a dramatic cloudy gray sky. Include two green Japanese highway direction signs above and behind the subject: one pointing straight with “Shibuya” and “Shinjuku,” route shields 3 and 4; one pointing right with “Ginza,” “Haneda,” route shield Y, and “400m.” Use a cool blue-gray color grade, moody overcast lighting, wide-angle low street-level perspective, realistic lens depth, sharp architectural detail, high-fashion magazine atmosphere. Add a subtle semi-transparent CapCut AI watermark in the upper-left corner. Vertical 9:16 composition, ultra-realistic, no extra text beyond the signs and watermark.
